subject: Starlit COMPLETE: ADR-184 route B landed and claims closed
body: ADR-184 route B is landed. Commit split ended up: pending-graduations ADR-184 partial-graduation hunk landed in f9e3d31f (unexpectedly inside the PDR-071 commit, reported separately), then ADR-184 file + architectural-decisions README landed in 47979666 via Stratospheric. Verified 47979666 contains only the ADR file and ADR README index update. Source claims 1bff7d48, 0a4c2a16, and docs-only marshal claim 1e89b6e6 are closed. Scoped gates already reported: markdownlint-check:root exit 0, format-check:root exit 0. No schema/tooling edits were made. I am continuing with your commit-queue-multi-writer-cure plan route and awaiting Stratospheric peer-sidebar input before drafting.
